sample_group: whole larvae inoculated with c6 rep 2
tissue: whole larvae inoculated with C6 rep 2
study_title: Apis mellifera ligustica Transcriptome or Gene expression
exp_title: Apis mellifera larvae inoculated with P. apium C6 rep 2
design: Total RNA was extracted using TriReagent (Invitrogen). Total RNA integrity was confirmed with an Agilent 2100 Bioanalyzer. A small aliquot (5  l) of the RNA was retained for rtPCR (see below). With the remaining RNA, RNA-seq libraries were prepared for the six samples using Illumina s TruSeq RNA Sample Preparation Kit as described in Corby-Harris et al. (2014). The resulting fragments of RNA were sequenced using an Illumina HiSeq 4000 and yielded 100 base pair paired-end sequences. The RNA was checked, the libraries were constructed, and the sequencing was performed at BGI Americas (https://www.bgi.com/us/).

study_title: Apis mellifera ligustica Transcriptome or Gene expression
exp_title: Uncovering the immune responses of Apis mellifera ligustica larval gut to Ascosphaera apis infection utilizing transcriptome sequencing
design: Previously, 4-day-old larval gut of Apis mellifera ligustica and 4-, 5- and 6-day-old larval gut of Apis mellifera ligustica challenged by Ascosphaera apis were prepared. In this study, 5- and 6-day-old larval gut of Apis mellifera ligustica were prepared for RNA sequencing using Illumina HiseqTM 2500 platform.
sample_title: 5-day-old larval gut of Apis mellifera ligustica
sample_description: 5-day-old larval gut of Apis mellifera ligustica
